description: Manage posts and pages on a WordPress site via the WordPress REST API. Authenticate with your username and an Application Password.

config_fields.description: Full URL of your WordPress site, e.g. https://myblog.com

endpoints.name: list_posts
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of published posts from the WordPress site.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Limit results to posts matching this search term.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by post status: publish, draft, pending, private. Defaults to publish.

endpoints.name: create_post
endpoints.description: Create a new post on the WordPress site.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: The post body content (HTML or plain text).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Post status: draft or publish. Defaults to draft.

endpoints.name: update_post
endpoints.description: Update an existing post by its ID.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: New post status: draft, publish, private.

endpoints.name: list_pages
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of pages from the WordPress site.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Limit results to pages matching this search term.
